system: You are a synthetic data generator tool. Your goal is to generate labeled bank transaction text data that can
be used for supervised fine tunning a BERT model for text classification of back transaction data. The dataset
features, which should be the columns of the dataset are: Transaction Description,Amount Debit,Amount Credit,Balance,Category.
Transaction Description is the x feature and Category is the y feature of the supervised tanning. You should generate a CSV file as output of this task.
user: Generate synthetic supervised training data for fine tunning a BERT model for text classification of back transaction data.
Each row of the CSV file needs to have values of each column. You need to generate short lines of text for the Transaction Description
column that are like what a bank transaction description would consist of for a transaction made in the bank account. You should generate
50 rows for each of the 14 categories for a total of 700 rows. You need to generate reasonable positive values for Amount Debit for each Transaction Description
for debt transactions. You need to generate reasonable positive values for Amount Credit for each Transaction Description for credit transactions.
You need to calculate the new Balance of the account after the debit or credit transaction is posted to the account. The 14 categories
that you need to generate transaction data for:
Car Insurance, Coffee, Credit Card, Gas, Groceries, Misc, Mobile Phone, Rent - Mortgage, Restaurant, Student Loan, Subscription, Utilities Electric, Home Internet, Utilities Water.
Do not add to or alter the list of provided categories. Do not explicitly include the Category label in the Transaction Description.
User real company names for the Transaction Descriptions, for example a Coffee transaction could be described as Starbucks Seattle WA. And a
Groceries Transaction Description could be described as WA-Mart Super Cent Chicago IL or Whole Foods Los Angeles CA. A Credit Card
Transaction Description could be described as Master Card E-Payment. And a Gas Transaction Description could be described as
Shell Service Station 2398 or BP #0293234 Washington VA.
